user_task_description: This slide contains three content cards that are obviously misaligned and unevenly distributed.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Align the three workstream cards so they sit on a clean horizontal line with even spacing.
atomic_scope: Only layout/alignment is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with evenly aligned cards.

inspired_by.title: Anyone else spending way too much time just formatting slides instead of actually thinking?

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Typography is plain
- Colors are inconsistent
- The deck has no master theme, but that is not the explicit request
